elements.title: Kim Petras
elements.contents: ... that Kim Petras (pictured) was described as the "world's youngest" person to transition?

elements.title: Nadia Echazú
elements.contents: ... that a textile cooperative that helps to lift trans women out of poverty was named after activist Nadia Echazú?

elements.title: gender marker
elements.contents: ... that sixteen countries fully recognize a non-binary gender marker for all individuals?

elements.title: Sharifa Yazmeen
elements.contents: ... that Sharifa Yazmeen, a transgender Egyptian-American theatre director, was the inaugural winner of the Barbara Whitman Award?

elements.title: We Are Green and Trembling
elements.contents: ... that the novel We Are Green and Trembling was inspired by a 17th-century explorer who was born as a woman but lived as a man?

elements.title: Hannah Nokes
elements.contents: ... that the trans woman Hannah Nokes was profiled in 1936 after getting electricity in her house?

elements.title: a benefit concert for the trans community
elements.contents: ... that a benefit concert for the trans community paid tribute to Alice Litman, who took her life after being denied gender-affirming care?

elements.title: Marsha P. Johnson
elements.contents: ... that Marsha P. Johnson once stated that there were "no straight people"?
